data_model.users: single table with role field (customer/admin), optional profile tables later
data_model.products: table with fields: id, name, description, price, image_url, stock, created_at, updated_at
data_model.orders: table with fields: id, user_id, status (pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, cancelled), created_at, updated_at, items (JSON or relation)
data_model.cart_items: table for persisted cart (user_id, product_id, quantity)
data_model.hero_sections: table or settings JSON for admin-editable hero content

image_handling.storage: compressed only; local static files during development, cloud storage (free tier, e.g., Cloudinary) for production testing

testing.backend: pytest with FastAPI TestClient (critical paths: auth, product listing, order creation, admin actions)
testing.frontend: Vitest + React Testing Library (cart logic, form validation)
testing.e2e: Playwright for critical flows (login, browse, add to cart, checkout)
testing.security: basic checks (OWASP top 10: XSS, CSRF, SQLi) – focus on authentication and role enforcement

error_handling.fallback_page: simple static error page for downtime

infrastructure.deployment_notes: Free tiers used initially; cloud storage added when testing on public web
